import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { FaUpload, FaSearch, FaFileAlt, FaTrash, FaEdit } from 'react-icons/fa'; import toast from 'react-hot-toast'; const DocumentsPage = () => { const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState(''); const [showUploadModal, setShowUploadModal] = useState(false); const [documents, setDocuments] = useState([ { id: 1, title: 'FAQ - Common Questions', category: 'faq', date: '2024-01-15', size: '245 KB' }, { id: 2, title: 'Product Pricing Guide', category: 'product', date: '2024-01-14', size: '1.2 MB' }, { id: 3, title: 'Service Terms & Conditions', category: 'policy', date: '2024-01-13', size: '856 KB' }, { id: 4, title: 'Customer Support Handbook', category: 'service', date: '2024-01-12', size: '3.4 MB' }, ]); const categories = ['All', 'FAQ', 'Policy', 'Product', 'Service', 'General']; const handleDelete = (id) => { setDocuments(documents.filter(doc => doc.id !== id)); toast.success('Document deleted successfully'); }; return (
